_comment: Template only. Copy to .claude/settings.json, then set every PLACEHOLDER and review each permission before use. Least privilege: start narrow, widen only when a human approves it.

permissions._comment: allow: read-only, low-risk tools. deny: patterns that touch secrets, history rewrites, or force operations. Anything not listed falls back to the harness default (usually: ask).

env._comment: Never put a real secret value here or in any committed file. Every value below is a PLACEHOLDER for local, uncommitted use only.
